title: CIVID Verified Leaders (Confirmed Deaths)
description: Separate table of conflict-related organization leaders whose DEATH is confirmed by reliable, corroborating sources. Includes role, organization, death date, location, short bio, and public image metadata when available. Named-person data is NEVER fabricated; only deaths independently confirmed by at least one authoritative/reliable source are included. Leaders reported killed but later confirmed alive (e.g. sentenced in absentia) are excluded.

organization.description: Hamas, IRGC, RSF, Iranian Armed Forces, etc.

bio.description: Short verified bio; only facts stated by sources.

verified_by.description: Pipe-separated list of authoritative sources independently corroborating the death.

event_id.description: Link to the corresponding event row if one exists.
